meaning: vt.簸,扬(谷),吹开糠皮,吹掉,精选vi.扬谷,分出好坏,飞行n.扬谷,扬谷器
examples: The committee will need to winnow out the nonsense and produce more practical proposals if it is to achieve results.
We should winnow out the errors in logic.
We have to winnow out and punish these foolish ideas.
Chrysler in particular is offering generous discounts to help winnow down remaining model-year 2011 inventories.
The new X prize is designed to winnow the genetic wheat from the chaff.
